bucket_rationale: Starter per the bucket rubric: 54 lines in [20, 80] + rules 0 ≤ 1 + hooks 0 + agents 0 + MCP 0. Minimal-config Python CLI tool (AI git commit message generator). T2.2 Security SKIP (CLI tool, no network server). CLAUDE.md is user-guide-oriented, not dev-oriented — T1.4 PARTIAL. T3.3 PARTIAL (git-ai-commit commands documented but not dev workflow). L3=+1 from commit workflow patterns, L6=+1 from actionable commands.
